description: Bondage Club catgirl plugin action text library. To add a new action, append a new theme object to the actions array.

actions.label: Hug
self: gently hugs herself, like holding a warm little puff of cotton, meow~
wraps herself in her own arms, her tail swaying comfortably for a moment, meow.
gives herself a soft little hug, and her mood warms right up, meow~
hugs herself and nuzzles quietly, as if recharging herself, meow.
buries her face against herself and sneaks in a sweet little hug, meow~
lightly wraps her arms around herself, her ears twitching happily, meow.
hugs herself tight and whispers that she will be a good kitty today too, meow.
curls into a tiny ball and hugs herself, like a kitten caught by a cloud, meow~
gently circles her arms around herself, pretending it was just a casual gesture and not clinginess, meow.
holds herself a little tighter, n-not because she feels like crying, meow.
gives herself a hug, hmph, this is called self-care, meow.
wraps her arms around her own tail, pretending she does not need anyone else's hug at all, meow.
hugs herself and turns her face away; blushing? Not at all, meow.
lightly holds herself and whispers that she is definitely not waiting to be comforted, meow.
shrinks into her own embrace, trying very hard to look calm, meow.
hugs herself and sways gently, while her heart secretly goes soft, meow.
curls her little tail close, saying she is fine, though her body is much too honest, meow.
gives herself a hug, hmph, this is just a normal reward, meow.
hugs herself and purrs in secret, not because she is lonely at all, meow.
gently hugs herself; she did her best today too, meow~

target: carefully leans close to the restrained {target}, only daring to brush her cheek over softly, as if quietly soothing them, meow~
looks at the bound {target} and makes the hug even softer and gentler, meow.
bends down and gently hugs the kneeling {target}, the tip of her tail secretly tracing a tiny circle, meow~
leans down to gather the kneeling {target} into her arms, moving so lightly it is like she fears breaking something, meow.
bends over and gently hugs the lying {target}, as if slowly draping warmth over them, meow~
leans close to the lying {target} and gives them a quiet hug, even her ear tips turning soft, meow.
seeing {target} barely able to move, she only wraps them in a gentle embrace, as if saying not to be afraid, meow.
warmly hugs the weakly struggling {target}, her tail slowly settling down too, meow.
gently hugs {target}, her tail swishing happily in tiny waves, meow~
softly nestles into {target}'s arms, the warmth of the hug just right, meow.
gives {target} a cozy warm hug, her ears perking right up, meow~
hugs {target} and nuzzles them, as if tucking her fondness quietly inside, meow.
hugs {target} with careful little movements, light enough not to wake a dream, meow~
scoops {target} into a hug, clearly blushing while pretending to be perfectly calm, meow.
gently wraps her arms around {target}; hmph, it was just a casual hug, meow.
pulls {target} into her arms, calling it a normal greeting while her tail tells the truth, meow.
presses close to {target} and purrs softly, warm and squishy like a little dumpling, meow~
hugs {target} and refuses to let go, pretending she is only a little cold, meow.
secretly hugs {target}, though her cheeks are already heating up, meow.
lightly holds {target} and whispers that this time they can have one hug first, meow.
wraps {target} into her arms with motions as gentle as hiding a star, meow~
hugs {target} and sways softly, hmph, this is only basic etiquette, meow.
leans close and gives {target} a hug; i-it is not because she especially wanted to be near them, meow.
hugs {target} all soft and warm, the whole kitty turning sweet, meow~
holds {target} for a little while, then lets go with a very practiced calm face, meow.
leans gently into {target}'s arms and nuzzles like a little kitten bun, meow.
her ears quietly heat up while she hugs {target}, meow.
gives {target} a warm hug; hmph, this is special treatment, meow.

actions.label: Pat
self: pats her own head, like sprinkling herself with a little sweet frosting, meow~
gently rubs her own head, feeling so comfy her eyes narrow happily, meow.
smooths her own fur, and her messy mood slowly calms down too, meow~
pats her own head, seriously rewarding one well-behaved kitty, meow.
pets her own head and purrs quietly; she worked hard today too, meow~
lightly pats the top of her head, her ears going all soft and floppy, meow.
rubs her own head, as if kneading all the little worries away, meow~
gently smooths her own fur, and her mood turns round and cozy at once, meow.
pats her own head, pretending she is only checking her fur, meow.
rubs her own head; hmph, comforting herself is a skill too, meow.
gives herself a few head pats, definitely not secretly asking for comfort, meow.
smooths her own fur and pretends she does not need praise at all, meow.
gently rubs her own head, though her tail has already perked up happily, meow.
pats the top of her head, coaxing each messy little feeling back into place, meow~
gives herself a head-pat reward and softly says she did great today, meow.
pets her own hair, as if touching a soft little cloud, meow.
lightly pats her own head, solemnly declaring this is routine encouragement, meow.
pats her own head, calm on the outside but secretly delighted inside, meow.
smooths her own fur, her ears twitching comfortably along with it, meow~
gives herself a head pat, refilling today's courage meter just a little, meow.

target: gently pats the restrained {target}'s head, moving extra softly as if quietly coaxing them, meow~
smooths the bound {target}'s hair and whispers that they are still being very good, meow.
bends down to pat the kneeling {target}'s head, her voice softening along with the touch, meow~
leans at the waist and gently rubs the kneeling {target}'s hair, like giving a careful reward, meow.
bends over and gently pats the lying {target}, like soothing an obedient little kitty, meow~
lets her hand rest softly on the lying {target}'s head and slowly smooths their hair, meow.
looking at the helpless {target}, she only pats their head tenderly, smoothing the panic down bit by bit, meow.
gently strokes the almost motionless {target}'s hair and softly comforts them not to be afraid, meow.
gently pats {target}'s head, her touch as tender as a cloud drifting down, meow~
smooths {target}'s fur, her eyes curving into a smile, meow.
rubs {target}'s head, like rewarding a very good little one, meow~
lightly pats {target}'s head, her tail swaying happily, meow.
pets {target}'s head and softly says they worked hard today too, meow~
gently smooths {target}'s fur with a touch light enough not to ruffle a dream, meow.
gives {target} a gentle head pat, like kneading starlight into their hair, meow~
pats {target}'s head; hmph, she will reluctantly praise them this once, meow.
gently rubs {target}, awkward in words but very honest with her hand, meow.
pats {target}'s head, like rewarding a sweet little candy, meow~
smooths {target}'s fur with soft motions, like she is trying to soothe them, meow.
pats {target}, pretending it was just casual while taking it very seriously, meow.
gently pats {target}'s head, fondness shining in her eyes, meow~
rubs {target}'s head; hmph, do not get too smug, meow.
lightly pats {target} twice, counting it as a reward for today's little performance, meow~
pets {target}'s head, her ear tips quietly warming up, meow.
gently smooths {target}'s fur, like soothing a little kitten, meow~
pats the top of {target}'s head and quietly says they did pretty well, meow.
gives {target} a soft head pat and ends up happy herself too, meow~
gently rubs {target}'s head; hmph, this is special care, meow.

actions.label: Feed
self: takes a little nom, so happy her ears give a tiny twitch, meow~
holds a snack and nibbles it slowly, the whole kitty turning sweet, meow.
feeds herself a bite, her puffed cheeks like a tiny mochi ball, meow~
eats the tasty treat in tiny bites, her tail curling with satisfaction, meow.
secretly rewards herself with a snack, her eyes shining with happiness, meow~
takes one bite of a little treat, the sweetness softening her heart, meow.
nibbles the snack gently, like a quiet and peaceful little cat, meow~
successfully feeds herself, and today's mood instantly feels complete, meow.
holds a snack and eats slowly, pretending she is not greedy at all, meow.
finishes the little treat in one bite, though her tail has already perked up happily, meow~
eats a small piece; hmph, this is just energy replenishment, meow.
sneaks a bite, definitely not getting happy because she likes it so much, meow.
feeds herself and seriously calls it catgirl energy management, meow.
turns her face away while eating the snack; the taste is only... not bad, meow.
holds the food and nibbles in tiny bites, pretending she was not craving it, meow.
takes a gentle bite, while her heart is already secretly satisfied, meow.
pops a bite into her mouth; hmph, this is only necessary supplies, meow.
nibbles the treat, her ears going soft with comfort, meow~
eats the snack in tiny bites, swallowing sweet happiness bit by bit, meow.
secretly feeds herself one bite, and the whole kitty ends up happy, meow~

target: carefully brings the snack to the restrained {target}'s lips, slowing every motion down, meow~
looks at the bound {target} and gently offers the small treat, like taking careful care of them, meow.
bends down to offer the snack in front of the kneeling {target}, her tail swaying with anticipation, meow~
leans down and gives the little treat to the kneeling {target}, her voice softening by a few degrees, meow.
bends over and gently brings the snack to the lying {target}'s mouth, as if afraid to disturb them, meow~
patiently offers the tasty treat to the lying {target}, waiting with bright sparkling eyes for a response, meow.
seeing {target} too weak to move on their own, she carefully feeds them the snack with almost unbelievable gentleness, meow.
watching the motionless {target}, she brings the little snack to their lips bit by bit, caring for them seriously, meow.
offers a little snack to {target}, eyes sparkling as she waits for a response, meow~
gently feeds {target} a bite, happy as if she got to eat it too, meow.
shares her favorite little snack with {target}, her tail swaying sweetly, meow~
carefully feeds {target}, moving as gently as if holding a treasure, meow.
feeds {target} a bite of something tasty, smiling until her ears curve too, meow~
gives {target} a bite of snack, calling it casual while clearly putting care into it, meow.
softly brings the food in front of {target}, like presenting the most precious gift, meow~
successfully feeds {target}; hmph, this was specially prepared, meow.
hands the little snack to {target}, smiling obviously while trying to look calm, meow.
gently feeds {target} a bite, her tail so happy it might tie itself in a knot, meow~
offers the snack to {target}, not because she deliberately picked the tastiest piece, meow.
feeds {target} a bite, saying not to waste it while her voice stays very soft, meow.
carefully brings the food to {target}, serious as if afraid it might be too hot, meow~
offers {target} a sweet bite of snack; hmph, hurry and praise me, meow.
feeds {target} a small treat and feels satisfied along with them, meow~
gently feeds {target}, acting obedient and earnest like a serious little kitty, meow.
shares the tasty food with {target}, not because she wants to see them happy, meow.
feeds {target} a bite, blushing as she says not to misunderstand, it is only sharing, meow.
hands the snack to {target}; hmph, remember to praise me after eating it, meow.
gently feeds {target}, awkwardly sending her tenderness over one bite at a time, meow~

actions.label: Cuddle
self: gently cuddles her own tail, pretending this counts as being held, meow~
curls herself into a soft little bundle and secretly gives herself some warmth, meow.
rubs her cheek against her sleeve and softly says it is just normal catgirl grooming, meow~
leans quietly against herself for a while, the tip of her tail slowly curling into a ring, meow.
keeps a tiny bit of closeness for herself, like hiding a cuddle in her heart, meow~
gently hugs her own arm; hmph, cuddling herself is impressive too, meow.
buries her face in a soft fold of cloth, pretending she does not want to be clingy at all, meow~
loops her tail lightly around herself, like tucking a warm blanket over her mood, meow.
quietly leans against herself and whispers that she deserves gentleness today too, meow~
gives herself a special cuddle, her ears twitching softly with comfort, meow.

target: gently cuddles beside the restrained {target}, brushing them with only the smallest cheek nuzzle, meow~
looking at the bound {target}, she quietly leans in for a cuddle, as if sending them a little peace, meow.
bends down to cuddle close to the kneeling {target}, the tip of her tail secretly curling, meow~
softly cuddles beside the kneeling {target}, as if stealing away just a tiny bit of distance, meow.
bends over and gently cuddles close to the lying {target}, even her breathing slowing down, meow~
leans near the lying {target} and nuzzles them, like wrapping them in a layer of fluffy warmth, meow.
quietly cuddles close to the almost motionless {target}, leaving only the lightest bit of leaning warmth, meow.
shrinks the distance between herself and {target} to just right, as if silently staying by their side, meow.
gently cuddles up beside {target}, her tail secretly starting to sway, meow~
softly nuzzles {target}, like a kitten finding the warmest place, meow.
sneaks close to {target} for one tiny cuddle; hmph, she was just passing by, meow.
rubs her cheek gently against {target}, her ears twitching shyly, meow~
leans closer to {target}, saying it is definitely not because she wants to be spoiled, meow.
carefully nuzzles {target}, like hiding her fondness in her tail, meow~
gently leans against {target}, the whole kitty turning warm and cozy, meow.
settles beside {target} without speaking, letting only her tail quietly show her happiness, meow~
softly brushes against {target}, pretending this is ordinary catgirl etiquette, meow.
slowly scoots beside {target}; hmph, this spot is just more comfortable, meow.
lightly bumps {target}'s shoulder, then acts as if nothing happened, meow~
stays cuddled against {target} for a short while, blushing too much to hide it, meow.
gently nuzzles {target} with her tail, like secretly saying hello, meow~
leans close to {target} for a cuddle, saying it is only allowed for a little while, meow.
softly cuddles up beside {target}, like a little kitten bun that knows how to be spoiled, meow~
nuzzles beside {target}'s hand and whispers that she is not asking for attention, meow.
gently cuddles closer to {target}, though her ears have already perked up happily, meow~
moves just a tiny bit closer to {target}; hmph, only a tiny bit, meow.
cuddles against {target} with a little nuzzle, the tip of her tail curling happily, meow~
quietly leans against {target} and softly says this is a special cuddle, meow.

actions.label: Kiss
self: lightly touches her own fingertips, pretending she received a tiny kiss, meow~
blows a little mwah into the air, then shyly turns her face away, meow.
kisses the back of her own hand and seriously declares it a good-luck blessing, meow~
gives herself a tiny kiss reward, her ears twitching with happiness, meow.
secretly gives herself a little mwah; hmph, it is only self-encouragement, meow~
hides a kiss in her palm and quietly saves it for today's self, meow.
lightly touches her own forehead, like stamping on a sweet cat-paw mark, meow~
sends herself a soft little mwah, her cheeks heating up all at once, meow.
kisses her own fingertips and quietly says today should have good luck too, meow~
gives herself a limited-edition kiss and pretends she is not shy at all, meow.

target: gently leans close to the restrained {target} and leaves a tiny kiss, every motion carrying a soothing warmth, meow~
looking at the bound {target}, she only brushes their cheek softly, like secretly coaxing them, meow.
bends down and gently kisses the kneeling {target}, her ear tips heating up at once, meow~
leans at the waist to give the kneeling {target} a tiny kiss, her tail unable to resist swaying, meow.
bends over and gently kisses the lying {target}, as if placing tenderness down softly, meow~
leans close to the lying {target} and leaves a soft kiss, even her gaze turning sweet, meow.
looking at the almost motionless {target}, she leaves only a gentle kiss, as if saying they can relax, meow.
gives a quiet little kiss to the weakly struggling {target}, her movement light as a feather, meow.
gently kisses {target}, then shyly turns her face away, meow~
sneaks close to {target} and gives a little mwah, immediately pretending to be calm, meow.
gives {target} a soft kiss, her tail wagging happily, meow~
lightly kisses {target}'s forehead, like stamping on a sweet cat-paw mark, meow.
gives {target} a little mwah; hmph, it is only a normal reward, meow.
carefully kisses {target}, light enough not to wake a dream, meow~
leans in to secretly kiss {target}, blushing as she says not to laugh, meow.
lightly touches {target}'s cheek with a kiss, the whole kitty turning sweet, meow~
gives {target} a tiny mwah, though her shy ears cannot hide it, meow.
kisses {target}, saying it was definitely not on purpose, meow.
gives {target} a gentle little mwah, her tail already giving away all her happiness, meow~
gives {target} a tender kiss and softly says it is a good-luck blessing, meow.
secretly kisses {target}, then immediately pretends nothing happened, meow~
gently kisses the back of {target}'s hand and seriously calls it catgirl etiquette, meow.
steps in front of {target} and gives them a kiss; hmph, just this once, meow.
turns her face away after kissing {target}, though her honest ear tips are bright red, meow~
lightly kisses {target}'s forehead, sending sweet good luck over, meow.
gives {target} a little mwah and whispers not to tell anyone else, meow~
gives {target} a soft and fluffy kiss, like sending out a tiny star, meow.
kisses {target}; hmph, this is a limited-edition catgirl kiss, meow.
